settings.title: Disable Glider
settings.comment: Disables the glider (can still be crafted but never activated)

settings.title: Show Speed
settings.comment: Display the player's speed in m/s while flying

settings.title: Climb Coefficiency
settings.comment: Glider's climb efficiency (0.2 = 1 meter climbed costs 0.2 m/s speed) (ww_climb_efficiency)

settings.title: Turn Rate
settings.comment: Turn rate in degrees per second (90 = takes 2 seconds to do a 180 turn) (ww_turn_rate)

settings.title: Drag Coefficiency
settings.comment: Drag coefficient (0.1 = 10% of speed^2 lost to drag). Balances high speed and prevents infinite flying or insane distances. (ww_drag_coefficient)

settings.title: Stall Speed
settings.comment: Stall speed in m/s. Player free falls below this speed. (ww_stall_speed)

settings.title: Activation Speed
settings.comment: Minimum speed in m/s required to activate the glider. Prevents accidental activation when jumping or falling. (ww_start_speed)

settings.title: Terminal Velocity
settings.comment: Maximum speed in m/s the glider can reach (terminal velocity) (ww_top_speed)

settings.title: Flap Vertical Acceleration
settings.comment: Vertical acceleration gained each time wings are flapped. (ww_flap_vertical_multiplier)

settings.title: Flap Forward Acceleration
settings.comment: Forward speed gained each time wings are flapped (ww_flap_forward_multiplier).

settings.title: Flap Hunger
settings.comment: Amount of saturation drained per flap. (ww_flap_hunger)

settings.title: Flight Hunger
settings.comment: Amount of saturation drained per second flying. (ww_flight_hunger)
